from __future__ import annotations

PARSERS_BY_SUFFIX = {
    ".json": "json",
    ".yaml": "yaml",
    ".yml": "yaml",
    ".toml": "toml",
}

def branching_on_file_suffix_or_mode_string_scattered_across_codebase_negative(path: str):
    for suffix, parser in PARSERS_BY_SUFFIX.items():
        if path.endswith(suffix):
            return parser
    return "unknown"
